SEARCH
Package clientGui.managerTeam

Class ManagerOptionsController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.managerTeam.ManagerOptionsController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController, javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class ManagerOptionsController extends clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator implements javafx.fxml.Initializable, MessageListener<Object>
Controller for the Manager/Employee Dashboard. Provides access to various management functions based on the employee's role. Handles restaurant schedule management (Opening Hours) and displays a scrolling ticker.

    • initTicker

      private void initTicker()
      Initializes the ticker by fetching all opening hours.

    • startAnimation

      private void startAnimation(double paneWidth)
      Starts the scrolling animation for the opening hours ticker.
      Parameters:
      paneWidth - Width of the ticker pane

    • initData

      public void initData(Employee emp, ClientUi clientUi, Employee.Role isManager)
      Initializes the controller with the logged-in employee's data. Configures button visibility based on the employee's role (Manager vs. Representative).
      Parameters:
      emp - The logged-in employee
      clientUi - The client UI instance
      isManager - The role of the employee

    • setButtonVisible

      private void setButtonVisible(javafx.scene.control.Button btn, boolean isVisible)

    • updateScheduleBtn

      void updateScheduleBtn(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Updates the schedule (Opening Hours) for a selected date. Validates input and sends a create/update request to the server.

    • removeSpecialDateBtn

      void removeSpecialDateBtn(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Removes the selected Special Date from the list and database.
